name: Archetype Appetites
description: Compatibility patch for Ancestral Archetypes on the Polymania modpack. Carnivore archetypes (cat, ocelot) can eat Farmer's Delight and Gone Fishing meat/fish; the parrot's chocolate allergy reacts to Farmer's Delight cocoa foods; and the copper/iron/tuff golem archetypes can eat PolyFactory metals. Follows Ancestral Archetypes' own diet tags and heal values.
